description_long: This is a compact quadcopter drone with a streamlined blue and black body, designed for aerial mobility in urban environments. The drone features four rotors, each mounted on a short arm extending from the main chassis, with blue accents on the rotor hubs. Its body is predominantly blue with a slightly textured finish, while the arms and landing gear are black, giving it a modern, high-tech appearance. The landing gear consists of two short, fixed legs at the front and two at the rear, providing stability during takeoff and landing. The central body appears to house the main electronics and battery compartment, with a possible camera or sensor module at the front. The overall design suggests durability and efficiency for tasks such as surveillance, delivery, or recreational flying.
description: A sleek blue and black quadcopter drone with four rotors, fixed landing legs, and a streamlined body, suitable for urban aerial tasks.
description_view_0: Front view showing the blue nose, possible camera area, and two front rotors with blue hubs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the drone's slim profile, blue top, and the arrangement of the rotors and landing legs.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the tapered back, rear rotors, and the symmetry of the arms and legs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the same slim profile and rotor arrangement as view 1, with clear visibility of the landing legs.
